text:
The paper clearly exists and is well-documented. The IEEE Xplore page (result 1) shows the paper with its exact title. Semantic Scholar (result 2) lists only "Hiroaki Sakoe" as the sole author, while BibSonomy (result 6) and many other sources list both "Hiroaki Sakoe" and "Seibi Chiba" as authors. The automated checker flagged an author count mismatch (2 vs 1), but this appears to be an error in the checker's own data — the paper is widely and consistently cited with both Sakoe and Chiba as authors.

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is confirmed on IEEE Xplore and multiple academic databases. While Semantic Scholar lists only Hiroaki Sakoe, virtually all other sources (BibSonomy, SpringerLink citations, CiNii, SCIRP, etc.) consistently list both Hiroaki Sakoe and Seibi Chiba as co-authors, matching the cited reference exactly.
LINK: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/1163055/
